历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 2666 → 3057 → 3704 → 3939 → 4474, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1808 places in the past 4 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 4474. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu for Physics Category was 207 in 2021, 211 in 2022, 208 in 2023, 203 in 2024, and 216 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 207, a reduction of 9 students (about -4.2%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 11–16 range in recent years, belonging to a top national comprehensive university. The 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents such as teacher ethics and academic misconduct (46 negative out of 51 incidents), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with average attention. Abnormal signals in admission scores appeared in 2022–2023. It has 19 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with balanced strength in medicine, humanities, and science/engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively hot. The total number of Gansu Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 179,817). By proportion, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 147,623, intensifying competition. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 374 points, stable in recent years. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (Southwest China), geographically adjacent to Gansu with convenient transportation, exerting strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), at a moderately low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment reduction (-4.2%), the significant increase in total Gansu candidates (+21.6%), and the negative reputation incidents that may suppress some popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 4474, competition is expected to slightly intensify but offset by the enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4392, with a range of 3892–4892.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) fluctuated significantly: approximately 357 → 1628 → 446 → 405 → 505. The spike in 2022 (1628) was due to batch merging; the last three years stabilized in the 405–505 range, with a baseline of about 505 in 2025. Enrollment plans in Gansu for History Category were 25 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 34 in 2024, 31 in 2025, and 41 in 2026, an expansion of 10 students (+32.3%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top national comprehensive university with deep humanities heritage. In 2026, reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents, which may suppress application willingness. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. Strong disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Marxist Theory A, etc., with outstanding humanities, history, philosophy, and law strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot (differentiated wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged. In 2026, total Gansu Gaokao examinees approximately 218,700, with estimated History Category examinees about 71,078, an increase of about 21.8% from 58,374 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 412 points, stable in recent years. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, geographically adjacent to Gansu, with strong regional appeal to Gansu examinees. Its History Category enrollment proportion in Gansu is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking range of 405–505 in the last three years, the significant expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026 (+32.3%), the substantial increase in total Gansu examinees (+21.8%), and the negative reputation potentially suppressing some interest, based on the 2025 baseline of 505, the combined expansion and examinee increase effects are expected to intensify competition. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 618, with a range of 547–689.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在甘肃省医学类近五年最低录取位次波动较大：2021年2666名（计划30人），2022年因护理学专业拉低至10568名（计划38人），2023年回升至2954名（计划30人），20 24年2903名（计划34人），2025年受护理学（含双学士学位）5人计划影响再次降至7626名（计划43人）。2026年医学类总计划43人，与2025年持平，但招生专业结构发生重要变 化——护理学不再纳入医学类招生，这意味着拉低整体位次的低分专业被移除，医学类最低位次预计将向核心专业区间回归。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家'985工程'和'211工程'重点建设高校，入选国家'双一流'建设高校（A类）。其华西医学中心是国内顶尖的医学教育机构，口腔医学连 续多年位居全国第一，临床医学、基础医学等学科实力雄厚，对高分考生具有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在甘肃省持续保持高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。四川大学地处成都，区位优势明显，对西北地区考生吸引力较强。2026年医学类招生4 3人，规模与去年持平，但专业结构调整（移除护理学）将改变整体位次分布格局。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及专业结构调整分析，预测2026年四川大学在甘肃省医学类最低录取位次约为7446名，波动区间为7223至7669名。由于2026年护理学不再纳入医学类招生， 医学类最低位次较2025年的7626名有所上升（位次数字减小），预计回升至7400名左右区间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical category in Gansu Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 2,666 in 2021 (plan 30), dropped to 10,568 in 2022 due to the nursing major (plan 38), rebounded to 2,954 in 2023 (plan 30), 2,903 in 2024 (plan 34), and in 2025, affected by the nursing (including dual bachelor's degree) 5-person plan, dropped again to 7,626 (plan 43). In 2026, the total medical category plan is 43, unchanged from 2025, but the structure of enrollment majors has undergone an important change—nursing is no longer included in the medical category enrollment, meaning the low-score major that dragged down the overall ranking has been removed. The minimum ranking for the medical category is expected to return to the core major range.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Category A). Its West China Medical Center is a top-tier medical education institution in China, with stomatology ranking first nationwide for many consecutive years, and strong disciplines such as clinical medicine and basic medicine, which are highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application enthusiasm in Gansu Province, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, with obvious geographical advantages, and is highly attractive to candidates from the northwest region. In 2026, the medical category enrolls 43 people, the same scale as last year, but the adjustment of the major structure (removal of nursing) will change the overall ranking distribution pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of the major structure adjustment, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical category in Gansu Province in 2026 will be approximately 7,446, with a fluctuation range of 7,223 to 7,669. Since nursing is no longer included in the medical category enrollment in 2026, the minimum ranking for the medical category will rise (ranking number decreases) compared to 7,626 in 2025, and is expected to return to around 7,400.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. Clinical medicine and stomatology have extremely high rankings and require rankings far above the upper limit of the predicted range to have a chance; pharmacy and medical technology are safe choices; public health and preventive medicine is a new enrollment in 2026 and can be used as a safety option.
